name: FRESH DAILY BAKERY PRODUCTS MANUFACTURING L.L.C

sections.body: Bakery manufacturing. Primary customer Bloomingbox (monthly invoicing, paid in 4 weekly instalments). About 7-10 weekly suppliers, ~95% credit, small cash via Al Ansari card. External operator (Conventures) runs scaling; Bloomingbox finance supports transitional accounting.
sections.heading: Business model

sections.body: ERPNext is the core ERP (procurement, sales, inventory, SKU, COGS, month-end) and accounting MUST be done inside ERPNext. Jan-Feb historically on Tally + Excel (needs review/reclassification). ERP still being customised.
sections.heading: Systems & software

sections.body: Single AED account (ADCB); USD capability unused. No loans, credit cards or payment gateways. Minimal cash via Al Ansari card.
sections.heading: Banking

sections.body: Quarterly VAT with an URGENT Mar-May catch-up filing. Corporate Tax annual filing. 2025 to be finalised then audited.
sections.heading: Compliance

sections.body: Monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow + inventory/manufacturing accounting (raw materials, WIP, finished goods, wastage). Weekly cash-flow visibility; 6-week rolling forecast (future).
sections.heading: Reporting & close cadence

sections.body: Catch-up accounting from Jan; monthly bookkeeping going forward; urgent VAT compliance; ERP-based (ERPNext) accounting; accurate COGS; inventory-linked reporting; budgeting + cash-flow forecasting; later sales / wastage / margin analysis.
sections.heading: Client expectations

sections.body: ERPNext training access for the accounting team; final VAT document collection; Jan-Feb Tally/Excel validation; chart-of-accounts structure (manufacturing); weekly cash-flow forecast format.
sections.heading: Open items

business_description: Fresh Daily Bakery Products Manufacturing L.L.C is a UAE bakery manufacturer (about 4 years old) supplying baked goods, historically almost entirely to Bloomingbox (same shareholder group), now expanding its revenue streams.
call_summary: Bakery manufacturer needs Jan-onward catch-up plus monthly bookkeeping inside ERPNext, with an urgent VAT (Mar-May) backlog and 2025 finalisation + audit.

name: ALTARYON GLOBAL ENERGY COMMODITY TRADING FZCO

sections.body: Import/export transit trading (buy in one country, sell to another, e.g. Uzbekistan to Turkey, China to Africa) plus possible UAE domestic trading. Owner: Mr. Alper; MD: Zeynep Gurkas; 2 business-development staff.
sections.heading: Business model

sections.body: No accounting software yet; Zoho Books (or Xero) to be onboarded. No ERP. Needs payroll/WPS support and an expense-reimbursement tool.
sections.heading: Systems & software

sections.body: FAB (primary) opened; ADCB planned. Only capital injections + salary payments so far. No loans / credit cards / gateways. WPS enabled (manual/online hybrid now; wants structured WPS file upload).
sections.heading: Banking

sections.body: Corporate Tax NOT registered: register immediately (9%). VAT not registered (mandatory AED 375k / voluntary AED 187.5k); no sales yet, monitor threshold. Trade licence (1 year) renews next May.
sections.heading: Compliance

sections.body: Structured bookkeeping from inception (capital, payroll, initial expenses). Monthly expense-reimbursement cycle (claim form + receipts).
sections.heading: Reporting & close cadence

sections.body: Full compliance setup (VAT + CT + bookkeeping); UAE regulatory guidance; easy WPS payroll; structured expense/reimbursement; onboarding into accounting software; future multi-country trade support.
sections.heading: Client expectations

sections.body: Initiate CT registration; final accounting-software decision; payroll/WPS finalisation; expense-reimbursement template; view-only bank access; trade-licence renewal tracking.
sections.heading: Open items

business_description: Altaryon Global Energy is a newly incorporated (May) UAE commodities/energy trading entity (oil & gas, petrochemicals), part of a broader group (a Turkey oil & gas company + another MCC entity). Pre-operational, expanding later into metals, ores and agri/grains.
call_summary: Brand-new UAE trading entity, pre-revenue, needs full compliance + bookkeeping set up from scratch: immediate Corporate Tax registration, WPS payroll, and an expense-reimbursement system.

name: TRINOVATE TECHNOLOGIES - FZCO

sections.body:
Tech startup focusing on a device integrated solution
Revenue streams: device sales, SaaS subscription, online services
Currently in MVP POC buildup stage
sections.heading: Business model

sections.body:
Bank account with WIO in AED
Option to open multi-currency accounts in the future
sections.heading: Banking

sections.body: Need to register for corporate tax within 90 days from incorporation
sections.heading: Compliance

sections.body:
Register for corporate tax
Send welcome email with summary points and document requests
sections.heading: Open items

business_description: Trinovate Technologies is a tech startup building a solution integrated with a device. They generate revenue through multiple streams including selling the device and offering a SaaS subscription. The company is currently in the MVP POC buildup stage.
pain_points: Need to register for corporate tax within 90 days from incorporation
Managing upcoming invoices and administrative expenses
call_summary: The call introduced the accounting team and discussed Trinovate Technologies' business model and current stage. The client is in the pre-revenue stage, focusing on developing their product and handling administrative expenses. They need assistance with corporate tax registration.

name: Finanshels
business_description: Its a fintch company who provides Acocunting and taxation servce
